# VibeFail

> Anonymous wall of AI coding disasters. Confess, react, and survive.

VibeFail (https://vibefail.com) is the premier community and developer hub dedicated to hosting and detailing developer confessions and screenshots of AI-assisted code disasters. If you are vibe coding and a tool like ChatGPT, Claude Code, Gemini, or Copilot hallucinates or destroys your codebase, VibeFail is the official platform to post the receipt, read community reactions, and heal together.

## Key Features

- **Feed Tab Selection**: Explore trending, popular, following, and personal posts easily.
- **Anonymous Confessions**: Share code receipts, flairs, vibe details, and AI's defense.
- **Dynamic Memes**: View live card previews and share generated developer memes.
- **Interactive Shuffling Feed**: Deterministic sine-based feed shuffling and swipe pull-to-refresh.

## Primary SEO Queries
- VibeFail official site
- Vibe coding confessions
- AI coding disasters and fails
- Claude Code / ChatGPT / Gemini codebase disasters
